eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: South Carolina; at 07:34 PM ON APR 20, 2026 Effective until 07:34 PM APR 21, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The South Carolina Law Enforcement Division has issued a Blue Alert for suspect Lacey Cushman female, white 5-9 200 lbs.  Last seen driving a 2011 white Chevrolet Traverse with SC tag 7061RU in Barnwell County. If seen, please contact 911.
